result.reason: Telnet.exe fails to launch from mRemoteNG because the argument parsing logic for non-batch external tools incorrectly removes quotes, preventing telnet.exe from interpreting arguments with spaces correctly.
result.approach: Modify SetProcessProperties in ExternalTool.cs for non-batch, non-elevated processes to use process.StartInfo.Arguments = parsedArguments; instead of splitting arguments and adding them to ArgumentList. This ensures that the argument string (including any necessary quotes) is passed directly to the external tool.
